hyperedges.label: Portfolio page sections rendered by Home
Sections wrapped in FadeIn for scroll animation

nodes.label: Terminal CLI UI pattern
nodes.rationale: An interactive CLI terminal is used as the hero interaction pattern, allowing users to explore portfolio content via typed commands — a distinctive developer-persona design choice.

nodes.label: FadeIn scroll animation pattern
nodes.rationale: Sections use a reusable FadeIn wrapper (framer-motion whileInView) for progressive disclosure — keeps each section component unaware of scroll animation logic.

nodes.label: Centralized data layer in lib/data.ts
nodes.rationale: All portfolio content (personalInfo, skills, experience, projects, cliConfig) is centralized in a single data file rather than scattered across components, enabling single-source-of-truth updates.
